proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with stage_iv=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with stage_iv=0.
Patients with liver_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with liver_mets=0.
Patients with bone_mets=1 have shorter mean pfs_months than patients with bone_mets=0.
Higher ecog_ps is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative beta in OLS).

Higher ldh_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative beta).
Higher crp_mg_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative beta).
Higher nlr (neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative beta).
Higher cea_ng_ml is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative beta).
Higher hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with longer pfs_months (positive beta).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with kras_mutation=1 have shorter pfs_months than kras_mutation=0 (negative diff).
Patients with nras_mutation=1 have shorter pfs_months than nras_mutation=0 (negative diff).
Patients with braf_v600e=1 have shorter pfs_months than braf_v600e=0 (negative diff).
Patients with msi_high=1 have longer pfs_months than msi_high=0 (positive diff).
Patients with her2_amplified=1 have a different mean pfs_months than her2_amplified=0.
Patients with ntrk_fusion=1 have a different mean pfs_months than ntrk_fusion=0.
Patients with right_sided_primary=1 have shorter pfs_months than left-sided (negative diff).
Patients on treatment_cetuximab=1 have different pfs_months than those off (raw mean comparison).
Patients on treatment_bevacizumab=1 have different pfs_months than those off.
Patients on treatment_pembrolizumab=1 have different pfs_months than those off.
Patients on treatment_encorafenib=1 have different pfs_months than those off.
Patients on treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 have different pfs_months than those off.
Patients on treatment_regorafenib=1 have different pfs_months than those off.

There is a negative interaction between treatment_cetuximab and kras_mutation on pfs_months: cetuximab benefit (positive effect) is reduced or reversed in KRAS-mutant patients (interaction term negative).
There is a negative interaction between treatment_cetuximab and nras_mutation on pfs_months.
There is a negative interaction between treatment_cetuximab and braf_v600e on pfs_months.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and msi_high on pfs_months: pembrolizumab benefits MSI-high patients more (interaction term positive).
There is a positive interaction between treatment_encorafenib and braf_v600e on pfs_months: encorafenib benefits BRAF V600E patients more.
There is a positive interaction between treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib and her2_amplified on pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among kras_mutation=0, treatment_cetuximab=1 has longer pfs_months than treatment_cetuximab=0 (positive diff).
Among kras_mutation=1, treatment_cetuximab does not improve pfs_months (no positive diff).
Among nras_mutation=0, treatment_cetuximab=1 has longer pfs_months than off.
Among nras_mutation=1, treatment_cetuximab does not improve pfs_months.
Among braf_v600e=0, treatment_cetuximab=1 has longer pfs_months than off.
Among braf_v600e=1, treatment_cetuximab does not improve pfs_months.
Among msi_high=1, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 has substantially longer pfs_months than off (positive diff).
Among msi_high=0, treatment_pembrolizumab=1 has no benefit on pfs_months.
Among braf_v600e=1, treatment_encorafenib=1 has longer pfs_months than off (positive diff).
Among braf_v600e=0, treatment_encorafenib=1 has no benefit on pfs_months.
Among her2_amplified=1, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 has longer pfs_months than off.
Among her2_amplified=0, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib=1 has no benefit.

After adjustment, treatment_pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months.
After adjustment, treatment_encorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months.
After adjustment, treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is associated with longer pfs_months.
After adjustment, treatment_regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: There is a negative interaction between treatment_cetuximab and right_sided_primary on pfs_months: cetuximab benefit is attenuated or reversed in right-sided tumors.
Among right-sided RAS-WT (KRAS=0 & NRAS=0) patients, treatment_cetuximab=1 has shorter or equal pfs_months than off (no benefit).
Among left-sided RAS-WT (KRAS=0 & NRAS=0) patients, treatment_cetuximab=1 has longer pfs_months than off.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a comprehensive multivariable OLS for pfs_months including demographics, prognostic features, biomarkers, and all six treatments, the strongest independent predictors will be ecog_ps, stage_iv, albumin_g_dl, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and treatment_regorafenib; targeted-therapy treatments (cetuximab, pembrolizumab, encorafenib, trastuzumab+tucatinib, bevacizumab) will not have substantial independent effects.

analyses.result_summary:
Multivariable OLS PFS ~ comprehensive covariates. Top significant terms (sorted by p):
  const: beta=-6.7724, p=0
  kras_mutation: beta=-0.3551, p=0
  albumin_g_dl: beta=+0.4695, p=0
  stage_iv: beta=-1.3605, p=0

proposed_hypotheses.text: Treatment_pembrolizumab is preferentially given to msi_high=1 patients vs msi_high=0 (positive proportion difference).
Treatment_encorafenib is preferentially given to braf_v600e=1 patients vs braf_v600e=0.
Treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib is preferentially given to her2_amplified=1 patients vs her2_amplified=0.
Treatment_cetuximab is preferentially withheld from kras_mutation=1 patients (negative proportion difference).

analyses.result_summary: treatment_pembrolizumab use: 15.8% in msi_high=1 vs 15.3% in msi_high=0; chi2 p=0.55
treatment_encorafenib use: 10.7% in braf_v600e=1 vs 10.2% in braf_v600e=0; chi2 p=0.512
treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib use: 8.0% in her2_amplified=1 vs 8.1% in her2_amplified=0; chi2 p=0.938
treatment_cetuximab use: 29.9% in kras_mutation=1 vs 30.3% in kras_mutation=0; chi2 p=0.379

proposed_hypotheses.text: Re-confirm: there is a positive interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and msi_high on pfs_months (final check).
Within msi_high=1, the interaction between treatment_pembrolizumab and prior_immunotherapy is non-zero (prior immunotherapy modifies pembro response).
